steps.title: Substitute the given input and output
steps.content:
The function is $f(x)=5x+b$, and $f(6)=30$. Substitute $x=6$ and $f(x)=30$:
$$30=5(6)+b$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: If $b=1$, $5$, or $6$, then $f(6)$ would be greater than $30$. Only $b=0$ keeps $f(6)=30$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $b=0$, which matches Choice A — $0$. Therefore A is correct.
